data.body: crust-fetch-stump epic: all 6 stories (S1 6014, S2 68ef, S3 199b, S5 c557, S4 ec5c, S6 7656) + module-size split refactor (458f) implemented, plan-reviewed PASS+signed, claimed, committed. Stack pushed to Gerrit as 7-change relation chain: 431(split) -> 425(S1) -> 426(S2) -> 427(S3) -> 428(S5) -> 429(S4) -> 430(S6). Shared session-id tooling: src/rebar/_commands/session_id.py used by both session_log and claim/transition. First CI push failed module-size gate (_processors.py 800->832); resolved by extracting the replay engine to src/rebar/reducer/_replay.py (split, not allowlist) -> _processors.py 652. Full make test green. REMAINING: wait Verified+1 per change, close children bottom-up 431->430, close epic 38ec, submit stack (needs LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1).
